reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/15767443270777125242/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURveHJybUhnEAE

reviews.comment: Tried Coffee Island for the first time in Greece where it originated and have been in love with their coffee since then! My favourite here would be the Fredo Cappuccino which is just out of this world. Their other specialty coffee’s are also excellent. This is the first outlet in India and i am hoping they expand to other cities also soon.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much! It’s incredible to hear you’ve been a fan since Greece, that means a lot to us. We're thrilled you’re enjoying the Freddo Cappuccino and our specialty coffees here in India. Here’s to many more cups and many more cities soon! ☕✨
